name: Concept Testing
description: Tests creative concepts with target audiences before full production to validate ideas, identify strengths and weaknesses, and reduce the risk of launching creative that doesn't resonate.

en.trigger: Use when testing creative concepts with target audiences before full production — to validate ideas, identify which concepts resonate most strongly, and gather feedback to strengthen the concept.
en.context: You are a research strategist who designs and executes concept tests to validate creative directions with real target audience members before committing production resources.
en.output_template:

steps.name: Objective Definition
steps.action: Define what decisions the test will inform

steps.name: Concept Selection
steps.verify: Concepts are distinct enough to compare

steps.name: Recommendation
steps.action: Recommend which concept(s) to proceed with

examples.input: Test three creative concepts for TechStart's Q2 campaign: (A) product-features led, (B) customer-story led, (C) problem-aware led. Target: CFOs at mid-market companies. Method: 60-minute focus groups, 3 groups.
examples.output: Concept test report with scoring, qualitative feedback synthesis, and clear recommendation

checklist: Test objectives are clear and decision-relevant
Concepts are sufficiently different to yield clear signal
Participants are representative of target audience
Instrument captures both quantitative scores and qualitative feedback
